title: Issue 1981 state-delta shared core

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Implement #1981 by making state-delta packet views derive from one shared compact core.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Preserve startup output budgets, visibility gates, packet-driven workspace-operating-loop surfacing, and implement/report compact defaults.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Choose the smallest shared helper and derived-view wiring that removes duplicated packet ownership without changing external packet names unnecessarily.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.
canonical_core.next_action: Publish the #1981 PR; proof is complete.
proof_expectations: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py tests/test_workspace_implement_cli.py tests/test_workspace_skills_cli.py
uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py summary --target . --format json
uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
completion_criteria: State-delta shared facts have one canonical builder/core source.
current_decision, message_economy, continuation_capsule, and evidence_bundle are derived views over that core.
Invariant tests cover proof boundary, claim/residue boundary, evidence, next action, expansion policy, and avoid-repeat policy.
Startup output-budget tests and visibility gates remain intact.

Added startup-context schema and generated reference coverage for the visible packets after conformance exposed the missing contract.

closure_check.accepted values: Accepted values: slice status = complete|completed|bounded slice complete; larger-intent status = closed|complete|completed for archive-and-close or open|partial|unfinished for archive-but-keep-lane-open; closure decision = archive-and-close|archive-but-keep-lane-open. Prefer `agentic-planning archive-plan <plan> --prepare-closeout` before hand-editing closeout fields.
closure_check.why this decision is honest: #1981 acceptance is satisfied by shared-core derivation, invariant tests, preserved packet names, preserved compact output budget tests, preserved visibility gates, and preserved workspace-operating-loop packet surfacing.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: Payload sync was applied with `uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py upgrade --target . --format json`; doctor planning reports installed-state compatible.
closure_check.reopen trigger: A review finds a duplicated state-delta owner or a packet view diverging from the shared core.

improvement_signal_review.guidance: At closeout, report AW smoothness/helpfulness gaps, better-way signals, unused-feature reflections, and places AW could help more. Route each concrete signal to exactly one owner class unless explicitly split, or mark no_signal_found after checking.
signals found: Payload must be kept synced as part of the PR branch rather than waived as pre-existing residue.
AW summary reported the active plan as full-intent-complete while closeout_trust still blocked on active_intent_satisfied=false for the same plan.
signals routed: Applied payload sync in this PR after user correction; no new issue needed.
Filed https://github.com/rickardvh/agentic-workspace/issues/1982 for the summary vs closeout_trust intent-satisfaction mismatch.

continuation: Branch proof and payload sync are complete; publish PR for #1981.
